title: Queue element expressions
body:
This PR includes a rework of the symbol_search code, and the symbol_search() API. That function has accumulated hacks over the years, leading to a lot of ad hoc handling of things like members/methods of symbols. So I redesign the symbol_search() interface and largely reimplemented the function. It's now much cleaner and easier to read. There is also a compatibility API so that all that legacy use of symbol_search() can continue as before, but we should work towards using this new API.

This PR is still draft because I'm in the process of putting this new API to use to address issue #436. 

I'm publishing this as a draft PR so people can see what's going on here.
